blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt, 3-1 up, walk into the greatest night in Norwegian football
A 3-1 aggregate lead takes Glimt to Internazionale's ground — Norwegian football's finest Champions League chapter is 90 minutes from completion. The whole nation is watching.
⚽ 21:00 — Bayer Leverkusen vs Olympiacos — heavy favorites at home, Olympiacos with nothing to lose

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Wednesday
items: Wed 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco ★ — French derby, 3-2 on aggregate, wide open
Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica ★ — narrow first-leg lead, tense second leg
Wed 18:45 — Atalanta vs Dortmund — Dortmund lead 2-0, on course to progress
Wed 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray — Juve through barring historic collapse
